backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing user profiles, note management with blob storage, study groups, quizzes, viva questions, Stripe payment integration, and role-based access control with admin and premium user features.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including components, pages, hooks, and styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system variables for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (dashboard, upload, browse, notes, quiz, viva, groups, profile, admin, payment), splash screen, and profile setup modal logic.
frontend/src/components/DashboardCard.ts: Reusable card component for dashboard tiles with icon, title, description, hover effects, and gradient background support.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner component displaying generated hero image with gradient overlay and headline promoting AI-powered study features.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with responsive header navigation, mobile menu, logo, conditional admin link for admin users, user profile display, login button, and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Internet Identity authentication button handling login/logout with loading states, error handling for duplicate authentication, and query cache clearing on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal component for initial user profile setup, collecting name, email, and college information with form validation and submission via useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Animated splash screen component that displays the app logo with fade-in/hold/fade-out phases totaling 2 seconds before calling onComplete callback.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionCard: Displays free and premium subscription tiers with feature lists and handles Stripe checkout session creation for premium upgrades at ₹69/month.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileDispl: Displays authenticated user's avatar with initials, name, college, and premium badge in a compact card format.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCheckoutSess: Mutation hook that creates a Stripe checkout session for shopping items with success/cancel URLs.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateStudyGroup.t: Mutation hook for creating study groups with id, name, and description, invalidating study groups cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAdminUserProfil: Query hook that fetches the admin user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllUsers.ts: Query hook that fetches all user profiles, typically for admin purposes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the currently authenticated user's profile from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validity with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsStripeConfigured: Query hook that checks whether Stripe payment integration is configured on the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useJoinStudyGroup.ts: Mutation hook for joining a study group by ID, invalidating study group queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of query hooks for fetching notes by subject, individual notes, study groups, quizzes, and viva questions from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile via the actor and invalidates the 'currentUserProfile' query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveQuiz.ts: React Query mutation hook that saves quiz questions by ID via the actor and invalidates the 'quiz' query on success.
React Query mutation hook that saves viva questions for a subject via the actor and invalidates the 'vivaQuestions' query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchUsersByEmail: React Query hook that searches users by email with 300ms debouncing, returning an empty array when the search term is empty or whitespace.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserAdminStatus: React Query mutation hook that sets a user's admin status by principal and invalidates related user profile queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserPremiumStat: React Query mutation hook that sets a user's premium status by principal and invalidates user profile queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadNote.ts: React Query mutation hook that uploads a note with metadata and file content as an ExternalBlob, then invalidates the 'notes' query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for a blue-purple gradient theme supporting light and dark modes, plus utility classes for glow effects, animations, and glassmorphism.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the App component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays all users with search functionality and allows toggling premium and admin status for users, with access restricted to admin users only.
frontend/src/pages/BrowseNotesPage.tsx: Page for browsing and searching notes by subject, topic, or college with filtering by subject dropdown and navigation to individual note details.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero section, user greeting with premium status, navigation cards for key features, and subscription plan information.
frontend/src/pages/GroupDetailPage.tsx: Page displaying details of a specific study group including name, description, and member list with navigation back to groups list.
frontend/src/pages/NoteDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed information about a specific note including metadata (topic, subject, semester, college), download button, and AI study tool cards (summary, quiz, viva). Includes navigation back to browse page and loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Shows a payment failure screen with an error icon, message, and action buttons to retry payment or return to dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a success confirmation after premium subscription payment with a list of premium benefits and a button to navigate to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile management page with a form to edit personal information (name, email, college, bio, year of study, department). Includes validation, character limits, and authentication checks.
frontend/src/pages/QuizPage.tsx: Placeholder page for quiz generation feature that displays a message indicating the feature requires premium subscription and external AI integration.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: Study groups listing page with a form to create new study groups (name and description). Includes navigation to individual group pages after creation.
frontend/src/pages/UploadNotePage.tsx: Note upload form allowing users to upload files (PDF, DOC, images up to 10MB) with metadata (subject, topic, semester, college). Shows free tier upload limit warning for non-premium users.
frontend/src/pages/VivaPage.tsx: Placeholder page for viva question generation feature that displays a message indicating the feature requires premium subscription and external AI integration.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, border radius variables, glow/neon shadow effects, and custom animations for accordions and floating elements.
project_state.json: Project metadata for Student Vibe app tracking implemented features (authentication, notes sharing, AI study tools, premium subscriptions, study groups) with a known issue that the admin route returns 404.
